testcase.name: gatewayHasRoutesForAllKitServices
testcase.system-out:
15:40:05.725 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.hospital.gateway.GatewayRoutesConfigTest]: GatewayRoutesConfigTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 15:40:05.999 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.hospital.gateway.GatewayServiceApplication for test class com.hospital.gateway.GatewayRoutesConfigTest
